expectation: Demonstrate how to encourage peers to make healthy mental and emotional health choices.
generated_question: Why do we need to be nice to our friends when they are sad?
appropriate_answer: It's really important to be nice to our friends when they're sad because it helps them feel better. When we show kindness, it's like giving them a warm hug that makes them feel loved and supported. This can help them start to feel happier again. Also, being kind to others teaches us to be good friends and makes everyone feel good around us. So, let's always try to be there for our friends when they need us!

expectation: Analyze how personal attitudes, values, and beliefs influence healthy and unhealthy personal health and wellness-related practices and behaviors.
generated_question: Why do some people eat junk food even if they know it's not good for them?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! It's a great question. Sometimes, people might choose to eat junk food even if they know it's not the best for them because of their personal attitudes, values, and beliefs. For example, they might really enjoy the taste or think it makes them feel happy in the moment. But they also know that eating too much junk food can make them feel sick or less energetic. It's important to remember that everyone has different thoughts and feelings about food, and it's okay to enjoy treats sometimes, but it's also good to try to balance those with healthier choices. If you ever have questions about what's good for you, it's always a good idea to talk to a grown-up you trust, like a parent or a doctor.

expectation: Summarize the benefits of living in a diverse society.
generated_question: Why is it good to have lots of different kinds of people around us?
appropriate_answer: Hi there! Having lots of different kinds of people around us is really good because it helps us learn new things and see the world in many different ways. When we live in a diverse society, we get to meet people from all sorts of backgrounds, which can teach us about different cultures, beliefs, and lifestyles. This not only makes our community richer but also helps us become more understanding and accepting of others. Plus, it’s fun to learn about new foods, music, and traditions from people who are different from us! So, having diversity around us is like getting a big, colorful puzzle where everyone brings something special to make the picture complete.

expectation: Demonstrate how to locate sources of valid mental and emotional health information.
generated_question: Where can I find out if my feelings are okay and what to do when I'm sad or scared?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! It's great that you're asking about your feelings. Sometimes we all feel sad or scared, and that's okay! To learn more about your feelings, you can talk to a grown-up you trust, like a parent or teacher. They can help you understand your feelings better. You can also read books or watch videos made for kids about emotions. Libraries and websites for kids have lots of good information. Remember, it's always good to share your feelings with someone who cares about you.

expectation: Identify options and their potential outcomes when making a decision that could lead to violence.
generated_question: Why do we need to be careful about fighting with others and what happens if we do fight?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! It's really important to be careful about fighting because when we fight, it can make everyone feel sad and upset. Fighting might seem like a quick way to solve a problem, but it often makes things worse. When we fight, we might say mean things or hurt each other, which can cause big problems. Instead, we can talk about our feelings and try to find ways to solve problems together. This helps keep everyone safe and happy. If you ever feel like fighting, remember to take a deep breath, count to ten, and ask a grown-up for help. They can teach you better ways to handle your feelings and solve problems. What do you think are some good ways to deal with feeling angry or upset?

expectation: Summarize personal strategies for avoiding vision damage.
generated_question: Why do we need to wear sunglasses and what else can we do to protect our eyes?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! Wearing sunglasses is super important because they help shield your eyes from harmful UV rays from the sun. Just like how sunscreen protects your skin, sunglasses protect your eyes. They can help prevent things like cataracts and other eye problems later in life. Besides wearing sunglasses, you can also protect your eyes by not looking directly at the sun, eating foods rich in vitamins A and C, and taking regular breaks if you spend a lot of time looking at screens. It's all about keeping your eyes healthy and happy!

expectation: Assess personal mental and emotional health practices and behaviors.

expectation: Explain how to receive consent and accept a lack or retraction of consent for sexual behaviors.
generated_question: What does it mean to say 'no' to someone who wants to do something private with me, and how do I know if they really mean it?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! Saying 'no' means you're not comfortable with what someone else wants to do. It's important to listen to your feelings and what makes you feel safe. If someone says 'no,' even if they said 'yes' before, it still means they don't want to do that thing anymore. It's okay to say 'no' anytime you feel uncomfortable. If you ever feel unsure about what someone means, it's best to talk it over with a grown-up you trust, like a parent or teacher. They can help you understand better and keep you safe.

expectation: Evaluate personal practices and behaviors that reduce or prevent sedentary behavior.
generated_question: Why do we need to move around instead of just sitting all day?

Moving around helps your heart pump better, keeps your muscles strong, and even helps your brain work better! So, think of moving as a way to give your body a boost of energy and keep it happy and healthy. It's always good to talk to a grown-up if you have more questions about this!

expectation: Explain how to select nutrient-dense foods when dining out.
generated_question: What are nutrient-dense foods and how do I know which ones to choose when eating at a restaurant?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! Nutrient-dense foods are yummy foods that give you lots of good stuff for your body, like vitamins and minerals. When you're at a restaurant, try to pick foods that have more of these good things. For example, you can choose grilled chicken or fish instead of fried foods, and go for veggies and fruits as sides. Also, look for dishes that use healthy fats like olive oil or avocados. This way, you get tasty food that also helps keep your body strong and healthy!

expectation: Use resources that provide valid tobacco-related prevention and cessation information.

expectation: Assess personal eating practices.

expectation: Use valid mental and emotional health services when needed or appropriate.
generated_question: What are mental health services and why do I need them if I'm feeling sad or worried?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! Mental health services are like special helpers that can support you when you're feeling really sad, worried, or overwhelmed. They can be things like talking to a counselor or therapist who has special training to help people feel better. Sometimes, just talking about what's bothering you can make a big difference. It's important to use these services if you're having a hard time because they can give you tools and strategies to manage your feelings and improve your mood. Remember, it's okay to ask for help, and taking care of your mental health is just as important as taking care of your physical health.

expectation: Describe the relationship between the menstrual cycle and conception.
generated_question: Why do girls get their period and how does it help them have babies someday?
appropriate_answer: Hi there! Girls get their period because their bodies are getting ready for a possible pregnancy. During the menstrual cycle, the body makes special cells called eggs in the ovaries. These eggs travel down a tube called a fallopian tube. If a girl has sex and the egg meets a sperm (which is from a boy), the egg can stick to the inside of her uterus. This is called conception, and it means she might be able to have a baby. But if no sperm meet the egg, the body gets rid of the extra stuff that was getting ready for a baby by having a period. So, periods help girls' bodies prepare for having babies, but they also show that no baby is going to happen this time.

expectation: Describe the importance of ‘time-alone’ between young people and the healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, nurse) to discuss sexual and reproductive health and other sensitive health topics.
generated_question: Why do I need to have my own time with the doctor to talk about private stuff like my body and stuff like that?
appropriate_answer: Hey there! It's really important to have some alone time with the doctor or nurse to talk about your body and other private things. This way, you can share anything you want without anyone else hearing. Doctors and nurses are there to help keep you healthy, and they know it's easier for you to ask questions and talk about sensitive stuff when you're not worried about others overhearing. Plus, they can give you the best advice tailored just for you. So, having this private time helps make sure you get the care you need and feel comfortable asking all the questions you might have.

expectation: Explain why household products are harmful if ingested or inhaled.

appropriate_answer: Hey there! Some things in the house might look or smell okay, but they're not meant for eating or breathing in. These products have special ingredients that can make you feel sick if you swallow them or breathe them in. It's important to keep them away from your mouth and nose, and always ask a grown-up before touching anything new in the house. They can help explain what's safe and what's not!

expectation: Evaluate the effectiveness of personal health and wellness-related decisions.
generated_question: How do I know if the choices I make about my health are good ones?
appropriate_answer: Great question! When you make choices about your health, it's important to think about how those choices affect your body and overall well-being. For example, eating healthy foods can help you feel better and have more energy, while getting enough sleep helps your body recover and grow. To know if your choices are good ones, consider how they make you feel both in the short term and over time. If you notice that you're feeling healthier, happier, and more energetic, then you're probably making good choices! Also, remember to talk to your parents or a doctor if you have any concerns about your health choices.
